mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings declines, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in greater than 60 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent over a 5-year sample.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and moderate inflation indicate robust consumer demand without pricing power erosion, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative forward returns in greater than 50 percent of triggered cases or interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects immediate supply-side capacity utilization that boosts short-term equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses to negative during post-shock recovery periods or 5-day forward returns show no statistical edge with t-statistic below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts signal expanding construction activity and durable goods demand, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 3-year windows or housing starts fail to predict equity direction with greater than 55 percent accuracy.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of central bank tightening, which compresses equity multiples and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in greater than 65 percent of high-inflation months or the signal loses predictive power when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 0.4 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment indicates a healthy labor market that supports consumer spending and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal generates negative returns in greater than 50 percent of observations or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Decelerating real GDP growth signals economic contraction that reduces corporate profit expectations, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in greater than 60 percent of GDP deceleration quarters or the signal fails to separate recessionary periods from expansions with statistical significance.
